name: Churu Cat Treats Chicken Recipe 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Chicken Variety creamy, grain-free puree made with real chicken. Boosts hydration, packed with protein and Vitamin E. Perfect as a snack, topper, or interactive treat for cats.
